ai_summary: Choice International Limited reported strong Q1 FY26 results with robust YoY growth in revenue (+16%), EBITDA (+49%), and PAT (+50%), driven by operational efficiencies and margin expansion. This performance was fueled by a growing broking client base, significant new advisory order wins (including World Bank-backed projects), and strategic expansion into Tier 3/4 geographies, with an AMC business launch imminent. While noting a seasonal QoQ revenue dip, the company projects sustained healthy growth (25-30% YoY for 3-4 years) across its diversified verticals, with no material red flags identified beyond typical industry competition.
